name: email-automation
description: Email Automation - MERN SaaS for Gmail + Brevo outreach, sequences and reply intelligence

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,worker -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev:worker --prefix server"
